name: My employer says my neck pain isn't work-related, help in Salt Lake?
description: Get causation opinion, appeal to Commission.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: My employer says my neck pain isn't work-related, help in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get causation opinion, appeal to Commission.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Challenge with IME or your doctor's causation letter; appeal denial.[2] Key factors: (1) Independent medical exam; (2) Show duties caused it; (3) Commission resolves disputes.[1] Gather stronger evidence. You can overturn.
